description: Account integrity and verification layer: Phone verification with Twilio/MSG91 geographic routing, email verification with disposable-email blocklist + DNS MX validation, device fingerprinting for sybil detection, behavioral signals (account age, typing cadence, mouse entropy). Also: age gating with DoB + step-up verification for under-18 features.
steps: 1. Create packages/moderation/src/services/phone-verification.ts: PhoneVerificationService with geographic SMS provider routing. Interface: SMSProvider (Twilio, MSG91). Route by country code: US/CA -> Twilio, IN -> MSG91, others -> Twilio fallback. Methods: sendCode(phone, locale), verifyCode(phone, code), getDeliveryStatus(messageId). Rate limiting built in (5 codes/hour/number, 60s cooldown).

2. Create packages/moderation/src/services/email-verification.ts: EmailVerificationService with: (a) disposable-email domain blocklist (load from static list of ~3000 known disposable domains), (b) DNS MX record validation (dns.resolveMx), (c) syntax validation, (d) send verification link with signed token. Methods: validate(email) -> {valid, reason, disposable, mxValid}, sendVerification(email, userId), confirmVerification(token).

3. Create packages/moderation/src/services/device-fingerprint.ts: DeviceFingerprintService for sybil detection. Accept client-reported signals: userAgent, screen resolution, timezone, language, canvas hash, webgl hash, installed fonts hash. Generate stable device ID from these signals. Privacy-respecting: no IP storage, signals hashed. Methods: computeFingerprint(signals) -> deviceId, checkSybil(deviceId, userId) -> {isSybil, confidence, linkedAccounts}.

4. Create packages/moderation/src/services/behavioral-signals.ts: BehavioralSignalAnalyzer. Tracks: account age score (newer = riskier), typing cadence (too fast = bot), mouse movement entropy (too uniform = bot), session patterns. Methods: analyzeAccount(userId, signals) -> BehavioralRiskScore, isHumanLike(signals) -> {confidence, factors}.

5. Create packages/moderation/src/services/age-gate.ts: AgeGateService. Methods: verifyAge(dateOfBirth) -> {ageGroup: 'under13'|'under16'|'under18'|'adult', restrictions}, requireStepUpVerification(userId, feature) -> {required, method: 'id_upload'|'parental_consent'|'phone'}, getRestrictedFeatures(ageGroup) -> string[]. Under-18 restrictions: no random chat, no dating, limited DMs.

6. Add types to packages/moderation/src/types.ts: SMSProvider interface, PhoneVerificationResult, EmailValidationResult, DeviceSignals, DeviceFingerprint, SybilCheckResult, BehavioralSignals, BehavioralRiskScore, AgeGroup, AgeRestriction, StepUpVerification
7. Create test files: phone-verification.test.ts, email-verification.test.ts, device-fingerprint.test.ts, behavioral-signals.test.ts, age-gate.test.ts
8. Update packages/moderation/src/index.ts to export all new services
acceptance_criteria: PhoneVerificationService routes US numbers to Twilio provider, IN numbers to MSG91 provider
EmailVerificationService rejects known disposable domains (mailinator.com, guerrillamail.com, etc.)
EmailVerificationService validates MX records exist for domain
DeviceFingerprintService produces consistent fingerprint for same input signals
DeviceFingerprintService detects sybil when same device used by multiple accounts
BehavioralSignalAnalyzer scores new accounts as higher risk than established ones
AgeGateService restricts random chat and dating for under-18 users
All tests pass with pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/moderation
findings: All 311 tests pass (86 new). Typecheck and build clean. Prettier reformatted via pre-commit hook. No external packages needed - used Node built-in crypto and dns modules.
